_metadata.description: EV parking requirements per 2025 CALGreen for multifamily residential

assigned.description: Assigned parking: 1 EV receptacle per dwelling unit at assigned space

unassigned.description: Unassigned/common parking: 1 receptacle per unit + 25% of remaining common spaces with installed EVSE
unassigned.notes: If assigned/unassigned split not provided, generate review issue.
